text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the autumn Tenno Sho, the Eternal Top
Three—Oguri Cap, Super Creek, and Inari
One—are preparing to fight for the crown. But
they're not the only ones.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is ready as well. She
acknowledges her waning self, and vows not to
break down—instead, she's going to break free.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She heads into the paddock determined to
shatter her old self, and find a new version of
herself among the debris.
